example_sentence_en: Please elaborate on your argument with concrete examples.
example_sentence_cn: 请用具体例子详细阐述你的论点。
inflection: 动词变化: elaborates / elaborated / elaborating

example_sentence_en: She was able to articulate her ideas clearly in the essay.
example_sentence_cn: 她能够在文章中清晰地表达自己的想法。
inflection: 动词变化: articulates / articulated / articulating

example_sentence_en: Every argument must be substantiated with reliable evidence.
example_sentence_cn: 每个论点都必须用可靠的证据加以证实。
inflection: 动词变化: substantiates / substantiated / substantiating

example_sentence_en: From the passage, we can infer that the author is optimistic.
example_sentence_cn: 从文章中我们可以推断作者是乐观的。
inflection: 动词变化: infers / inferred / inferring

example_sentence_en: From the data, scientists can deduce the cause of the problem.
example_sentence_cn: 科学家可以从数据中推导出问题的原因。
inflection: 动词变化: deduces / deduced / deducing

example_sentence_en: Good readers can discern the author's tone from the text.
example_sentence_cn: 优秀的读者能从文本中辨别出作者的语气。
inflection: 动词变化: discerns / discerned / discerning

example_sentence_en: How we perceive a problem affects how we solve it.
example_sentence_cn: 我们如何感知一个问题影响我们如何解决它。
inflection: 动词变化: perceives / perceived / perceiving

example_sentence_en: She contemplated the meaning of the poem carefully.
example_sentence_cn: 她仔细地思考了这首诗的含义。
inflection: 动词变化: contemplates / contemplated / contemplating

example_sentence_en: Some students struggle to comprehend complex texts.
example_sentence_cn: 一些学生很难理解复杂的文本。
inflection: 动词变化: comprehends / comprehended / comprehending

example_sentence_en: Different people interpret the same text in different ways.
example_sentence_cn: 不同的人以不同的方式理解同一文本。
inflection: 动词变化: interprets / interpreted / interpreting

example_sentence_en: The author conveys a sense of hopelessness through the imagery.
example_sentence_cn: 作者通过意象传达了一种绝望的感觉。
inflection: 动词变化: conveys / conveyed / conveying

example_sentence_en: The writer depicts the struggles of the working class.
example_sentence_cn: 这位作家描绘了工人阶级的挣扎。
inflection: 动词变化: depicts / depicted / depicting

example_sentence_en: The vivid description evokes a strong emotional response.
example_sentence_cn: 生动的描述唤起了强烈的情感共鸣。
inflection: 动词变化: evokes / evoked / evoking

example_sentence_en: The examples in the essay illuminate the main argument.
example_sentence_cn: 文章中的例子阐明了主要论点。
inflection: 动词变化: illuminates / illuminated / illuminating

example_sentence_en: Teachers always emphasize the importance of reading widely.
example_sentence_cn: 老师们总是强调广泛阅读的重要性。
inflection: 动词变化: emphasizes / emphasized / emphasizing

example_sentence_en: This case exemplifies the dangers of overconfidence.
example_sentence_cn: 这个案例体现了过度自信的危险。
inflection: 动词变化: exemplifies / exemplified / exemplifying

example_sentence_en: The evidence contradicts the hypothesis.
example_sentence_cn: 证据与假设相矛盾。
inflection: 动词变化: contradicts / contradicted / contradicting

example_sentence_en: He skillfully rebutted each point of the opposing argument.
example_sentence_cn: 他熟练地反驳了对方论点的每一点。
inflection: 动词变化: rebuts / rebutted / rebutting

example_sentence_en: Experiments were conducted to validate the theory.
example_sentence_cn: 进行了实验来验证这一理论。
inflection: 动词变化: validates / validated / validating

example_sentence_en: Please verify the accuracy of the data before submission.
example_sentence_cn: 提交前请核实数据的准确性。
inflection: 动词变化: verifies / verified / verifying

example_sentence_en: Examiners scrutinize every detail of the written response.
example_sentence_cn: 考官仔细审查书面答案的每一个细节。
inflection: 动词变化: scrutinizes / scrutinized / scrutinizing

example_sentence_en: High-scoring students acknowledge their weaknesses early.
example_sentence_cn: 高分学生会及早承认自己的弱点。
inflection: 动词变化: acknowledges / acknowledged / acknowledging

example_sentence_en: It is important to distinguish between fact and opinion.
example_sentence_cn: 区分事实和观点是很重要的。
inflection: 动词变化: distinguishes / distinguished / distinguishing

example_sentence_en: Can you elaborate on what you mean by that statement?
example_sentence_cn: 你能详细说明那句话的意思吗？
inflection: 动词变化: elaborates / elaborated / elaborating

example_sentence_en: Doing practice papers reinforces exam technique.
example_sentence_cn: 做模拟试卷能巩固应试技巧。
inflection: 动词变化: reinforces / reinforced / reinforcing

example_sentence_en: Evidence underpins every strong academic argument.
example_sentence_cn: 证据是每一个有力学术论点的基础。
inflection: 动词变化: underpins / underpinned / underpinning

example_sentence_en: It is hard to sustain concentration during long reading passages.
example_sentence_cn: 在长篇阅读段落中保持专注是很难的。
inflection: 动词变化: sustains / sustained / sustaining

example_sentence_en: Some scholars contend that the policy has been ineffective.
example_sentence_cn: 一些学者主张该政策一直无效。
inflection: 动词变化: contends / contended / contending

example_sentence_en: The author asserts that technology is transforming education.
example_sentence_cn: 作者断言技术正在改变教育。
inflection: 动词变化: asserts / asserted / asserting

example_sentence_en: He conceded that the opposing argument had some merit.
example_sentence_cn: 他承认对方的论点有一定的道理。
inflection: 动词变化: concedes / conceded / conceding

example_sentence_en: We can extrapolate future trends from the current data.
example_sentence_cn: 我们可以从当前数据推断未来趋势。
inflection: 动词变化: extrapolates / extrapolated / extrapolating

example_sentence_en: The author alludes to the consequences without stating them directly.
example_sentence_cn: 作者暗指后果而没有直接说明。
inflection: 动词变化: alludes / alluded / alluding

example_sentence_en: The tone of the passage implies a critical attitude.
example_sentence_cn: 文章的语气暗示了一种批判性态度。
inflection: 动词变化: implies / implied / implying

example_sentence_en: Her success can be attributed to years of hard work.
example_sentence_cn: 她的成功可以归因于多年的努力工作。
inflection: 动词变化: attributes / attributed / attributing

example_sentence_en: Practice tests constitute an important part of exam preparation.
example_sentence_cn: 模拟测试构成了备考的重要组成部分。
inflection: 动词变化: constitutes / constituted / constituting

example_sentence_en: The course encompasses a wide range of topics.
example_sentence_cn: 这门课程涵盖了广泛的主题。
inflection: 动词变化: encompasses / encompassed / encompassing

example_sentence_en: Consistent effort yields excellent exam results.
example_sentence_cn: 持续的努力会产生优异的考试成绩。
inflection: 动词变化: yields / yielded / yielding

example_sentence_en: Reading widely illuminates ideas that exams test.
example_sentence_cn: 广泛阅读能启发考试所考查的思想。
inflection: 动词变化: illuminates / illuminated / illuminating

example_sentence_en: Stress can manifest as lack of concentration during exams.
example_sentence_cn: 压力可能在考试中表现为注意力不集中。
inflection: 动词变化: manifests / manifested / manifesting

example_sentence_en: A positive attitude prevails when students are well-prepared.
example_sentence_cn: 当学生准备充分时，积极的态度会占主导。
inflection: 动词变化: prevails / prevailed / prevailing

example_sentence_en: New patterns emerge from analyzing multiple past papers.
example_sentence_cn: 通过分析多套历年试题，新的规律就会浮现。
inflection: 动词变化: emerges / emerged / emerging

example_sentence_en: Anxiety diminishes when you are fully prepared.
example_sentence_cn: 当你做好充分准备时，焦虑就会减少。
inflection: 动词变化: diminishes / diminished / diminishing

example_sentence_en: Targeted practice accelerates improvement in weak areas.
example_sentence_cn: 有针对性的练习可以加速薄弱领域的提升。
inflection: 动词变化: accelerates / accelerated / accelerating

example_sentence_en: Good preparation helps mitigate exam anxiety.
example_sentence_cn: 充分的准备有助于减轻考试焦虑。
inflection: 动词变化: mitigates / mitigated / mitigating

example_sentence_en: Exercise can alleviate stress during the revision period.
example_sentence_cn: 锻炼可以缓解复习阶段的压力。
inflection: 动词变化: alleviates / alleviated / alleviating

example_sentence_en: Poor time management can exacerbate exam stress.
example_sentence_cn: 时间管理不当可能会加重考试压力。
inflection: 动词变化: exacerbates / exacerbated / exacerbating

example_sentence_en: Note-taking complements active reading for deeper understanding.
example_sentence_cn: 做笔记与积极阅读相辅相成，有助于更深入的理解。
inflection: 动词变化: complements / complemented / complementing; 复数: complements

example_sentence_en: Integrate knowledge from different subjects to answer complex questions.
example_sentence_cn: 整合不同学科的知识来回答复杂问题。
inflection: 动词变化: integrates / integrated / integrating

example_sentence_en: Use practice papers to assess your exam readiness.
example_sentence_cn: 用模拟试卷来评估你的应试准备程度。
inflection: 动词变化: assesses / assessed / assessing

example_sentence_en: Write a critique of the author's argument in the passage.
example_sentence_cn: 对文章中作者的论点进行评论。
inflection: 动词变化: critiques / critiqued / critiquing; 复数: critiques

example_sentence_en: The skill of paraphrasing is tested in both reading and writing.
example_sentence_cn: 改述的技能在阅读和写作中都会被考查。
inflection: 动词变化: paraphrases / paraphrased / paraphrasing

example_sentence_en: Coherence is a key feature of high-scoring essays.
example_sentence_cn: 连贯性是高分作文的关键特征。
inflection: 不可数名词

example_sentence_en: Conciseness in writing avoids unnecessary repetition.
example_sentence_cn: 写作中的简洁性避免了不必要的重复。
inflection: 不可数名词

example_sentence_en: Accuracy in language use is rewarded in all exam sections.
example_sentence_cn: 语言使用的准确性在所有考试部分都会得到奖励。
inflection: 不可数名词

example_sentence_en: Language proficiency improves with consistent practice.
example_sentence_cn: 语言水平随着持续练习而提高。
inflection: 不可数名词

example_sentence_en: Recognizing nuances in tone improves reading comprehension.
example_sentence_cn: 识别语气的细微差别可以提高阅读理解能力。
inflection: 复数: nuances

example_sentence_en: Understanding the subtext helps uncover the author's true intention.
example_sentence_cn: 理解潜台词有助于发现作者的真实意图。
inflection: 复数: subtexts

example_sentence_en: Making logical inferences is a critical reading skill.
example_sentence_cn: 做出逻辑推断是一项关键的阅读技能。
inflection: 复数: inferences

example_sentence_en: The scientists tested several hypotheses before reaching a conclusion.
example_sentence_cn: 科学家在得出结论之前测试了几个假设。
inflection: 复数: hypotheses

example_sentence_en: A flawed premise leads to an invalid conclusion.
example_sentence_cn: 有缺陷的前提会导致无效的结论。
inflection: 复数: premises

example_sentence_en: High-scoring essays require a synthesis of ideas from multiple sources.
example_sentence_cn: 高分作文需要综合多个来源的观点。
inflection: 复数: syntheses

example_sentence_en: A clear thesis statement sets the direction of the essay.
example_sentence_cn: 清晰的论点陈述为文章定下方向。
inflection: 复数: theses

example_sentence_en: Using an analogy makes complex concepts easier to grasp.
example_sentence_cn: 使用类比使复杂的概念更容易理解。
inflection: 复数: analogies

example_sentence_en: The irony in the passage reveals the author's critical stance.
example_sentence_cn: 文章中的讽刺揭示了作者的批判立场。
inflection: 复数: ironies

example_sentence_en: The paradox in the text challenges the reader's assumptions.
example_sentence_cn: 文本中的悖论挑战了读者的假设。
inflection: 复数: paradoxes

example_sentence_en: The word 'home' has positive connotations of warmth and safety.
example_sentence_cn: "home"这个词有温暖和安全的正面内涵。
inflection: 复数: connotations

example_sentence_en: The denotation of 'home' is simply a place where one lives.
example_sentence_cn: "home"的字面意义是某人居住的地方。
inflection: 复数: denotations

example_sentence_en: Powerful rhetoric can persuade readers effectively.
example_sentence_cn: 有力的修辞可以有效地说服读者。
inflection: 不可数名词

example_sentence_en: Avoid ambiguity in your writing by being precise.
example_sentence_cn: 通过精确表达避免写作中的歧义。
inflection: 复数: ambiguities

example_sentence_en: Identify the tone of the passage in reading comprehension tasks.
example_sentence_cn: 在阅读理解任务中识别文章的语气。
inflection: 复数: tones

example_sentence_en: Identify bias in a text by analyzing the language used.
example_sentence_cn: 通过分析所用语言来识别文本中的偏见。
inflection: 复数: biases

example_sentence_en: Objectivity is essential when writing an argumentative essay.
example_sentence_cn: 写论证文章时客观性是必不可少的。
inflection: 不可数名词

example_sentence_en: Excessive subjectivity weakens the credibility of an argument.
example_sentence_cn: 过度主观性会削弱论点的可信度。
inflection: 不可数名词

example_sentence_en: Citing reliable sources enhances the credibility of your argument.
example_sentence_cn: 引用可靠来源增强了你论点的可信度。
inflection: 不可数名词

example_sentence_en: Every piece of evidence should demonstrate relevance to the argument.
example_sentence_cn: 每一条证据都应该证明与论点的相关性。
inflection: 不可数名词

example_sentence_en: Check the validity of each argument before including it.
example_sentence_cn: 在加入之前检查每个论点的有效性。
inflection: 不可数名词

example_sentence_en: A coherent response demonstrates logical thinking.
example_sentence_cn: 一个连贯的回答展示了逻辑性思维。
inflection: 比较级: more coherent | 最高级: most coherent

example_sentence_en: Concise answers score better in short-answer questions.
example_sentence_cn: 简洁的答案在简答题中得分更高。
inflection: 比较级: more concise | 最高级: most concise

example_sentence_en: Rigorous practice with past papers builds exam confidence.
example_sentence_cn: 严格地进行历年真题练习能建立应试信心。
inflection: 比较级: more rigorous | 最高级: most rigorous

example_sentence_en: The theme of hope is pervasive throughout the novel.
example_sentence_cn: 希望的主题贯穿整部小说。
inflection: 比较级: more pervasive | 最高级: most pervasive

example_sentence_en: A nuanced argument shows deep understanding of the topic.
example_sentence_cn: 细致的论证显示了对主题的深刻理解。
inflection: 无

example_sentence_en: The implicit message of the text is one of social criticism.
example_sentence_cn: 文本的隐含信息是社会批评。
inflection: 无

example_sentence_en: Make your thesis statement explicit in the introduction.
example_sentence_cn: 在引言中明确表达你的论点。
inflection: 无

example_sentence_en: The view that education reduces inequality is prevalent.
example_sentence_cn: 教育能减少不平等的观点非常普遍。
inflection: 比较级: more prevalent | 最高级: most prevalent

example_sentence_en: Some mistakes are inevitable, but learning from them is essential.
example_sentence_cn: 一些错误是不可避免的，但从中学习是至关重要的。
inflection: 无

example_sentence_en: A comprehensive review ensures no key topic is missed.
example_sentence_cn: 全面的复习确保没有遗漏关键主题。
inflection: 比较级: more comprehensive | 最高级: most comprehensive

example_sentence_en: Meticulous error analysis helps avoid repeated mistakes.
example_sentence_cn: 细致的错误分析有助于避免重复犯错。
inflection: 比较级: more meticulous | 最高级: most meticulous

example_sentence_en: The exam has a profound impact on students' future paths.
example_sentence_cn: 考试对学生未来的道路有深远的影响。
inflection: 比较级: more profound | 最高级: most profound

example_sentence_en: Intrinsic motivation is more sustainable than external rewards.
example_sentence_cn: 内在动机比外部奖励更具持续性。
inflection: 无

example_sentence_en: A systematic approach to revision yields the best results.
example_sentence_cn: 系统的复习方法会产生最好的结果。
inflection: 无

example_sentence_en: Strategic time allocation maximizes revision efficiency.
example_sentence_cn: 战略性的时间分配最大化了复习效率。
inflection: 无

example_sentence_en: Only plausible answer options should be selected in multiple choice.
example_sentence_cn: 在多项选择题中只应选择合理的答案选项。
inflection: 比较级: more plausible | 最高级: most plausible

example_sentence_en: Erroneous assumptions often lead to incorrect answers.
example_sentence_cn: 错误的假设往往导致不正确的答案。
inflection: 比较级: more erroneous | 最高级: most erroneous

example_sentence_en: Make sure your answers are adequate in length and detail.
example_sentence_cn: 确保你的答案在长度和细节上都是足够的。
inflection: 比较级: more adequate | 最高级: most adequate

example_sentence_en: Substantial improvement comes from consistent daily study.
example_sentence_cn: 实质性的进步来自于每天持续不断的学习。
inflection: 无

example_sentence_en: Critical reading involves questioning the author's assumptions.
example_sentence_cn: 批判性阅读涉及对作者假设的质疑。
inflection: 无

example_sentence_en: Outstanding exam answers are specific, logical, and well-structured.
example_sentence_cn: 优秀的考试答案是具体的、有逻辑的、结构良好的。
inflection: 无

example_sentence_en: Maintaining motivation during the sprint stage is crucial.
example_sentence_cn: 在冲刺阶段保持积极性至关重要。
inflection: 复数: motivations

example_sentence_en: Resilience allows students to recover quickly from setbacks.
example_sentence_cn: 韧性使学生能够从挫折中迅速恢复。
inflection: 不可数名词

example_sentence_en: Perseverance through the final revision stage is vital.
example_sentence_cn: 在最终复习阶段坚持不懈是至关重要的。
inflection: 不可数名词

example_sentence_en: Deep concentration during practice exams simulates real test conditions.
example_sentence_cn: 模拟考试时的深度专注模拟了真实的考试条件。
inflection: 不可数名词

example_sentence_en: Mental stamina is required for long exam sessions.
example_sentence_cn: 长时间的考试需要心理耐力。
inflection: 不可数名词

example_sentence_en: Confidence comes from thorough preparation and practice.
example_sentence_cn: 信心来自于充分的准备和练习。
inflection: 不可数名词

example_sentence_en: Maintaining composure during difficult exam questions is key.
example_sentence_cn: 在遇到难题时保持镇定是关键。
inflection: 不可数名词

example_sentence_en: Precision in language use is rewarded in writing tasks.
example_sentence_cn: 语言使用的精确在写作任务中会得到奖励。
inflection: 不可数名词

example_sentence_en: Developing a test-taking strategy improves time management.
example_sentence_cn: 制定应试策略可以改善时间管理。
inflection: 复数: strategies

example_sentence_en: Past papers serve as benchmarks for measuring progress.
example_sentence_cn: 历年真题作为衡量进步的基准。
inflection: 复数: benchmarks

example_sentence_en: Use a structured framework when planning essay answers.
example_sentence_cn: 计划文章答案时使用结构化框架。
inflection: 复数: frameworks

example_sentence_en: Understanding the marking criterion helps you meet examiner expectations.
example_sentence_cn: 了解评分标准有助于你达到考官的期望。
inflection: 复数: criteria

example_sentence_en: A breakthrough in understanding grammar rules boosts confidence.
example_sentence_cn: 理解语法规则的突破可以增强信心。
inflection: 复数: breakthroughs

example_sentence_en: Keep the momentum going in the final weeks of revision.
example_sentence_cn: 在复习的最后几周保持势头。
inflection: 不可数名词

example_sentence_en: Diligence and determination are the keys to exam success.
example_sentence_cn: 勤奋和决心是考试成功的关键。
inflection: 不可数名词

example_sentence_en: Hold on to your aspirations during the most challenging moments.
example_sentence_cn: 在最艰难的时刻坚守你的志向。
inflection: 复数: aspirations

example_sentence_en: Every endeavor you make now brings you closer to success.
example_sentence_cn: 你现在所做的每一份努力都使你离成功更近。
inflection: 动词变化: endeavors / endeavored / endeavoring; 复数: endeavors

example_sentence_en: Dedication to your studies will be rewarded on exam day.
example_sentence_cn: 对学习的全身心投入将在考试当天得到回报。
inflection: 不可数名词

example_sentence_en: The fulfillment of achieving your best score makes it all worthwhile.
example_sentence_cn: 实现最佳成绩的成就感让一切努力都是值得的。
inflection: 不可数名词
